events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: this fails compliance — dry-rated conductor insulation was installed in a wet location, violating NEC 310.10(C) and the insulation-type ratings in Table 310.16. Marked as high risk, `installed-defective`/`non-compliant`, with corrective action to replace with wet-location-listed conductors (e.g., THWN-2/XHHW-2) before re-inspection, since the work is still rough-complete and correctable.
